audit_items.proof_trace: `assetOutAmount` is a stack-allocated local variable computed once at line 442 via `_getAssetOutAmount` before any external calls. It is passed directly and unchanged to `safeTransferFrom` at line 453, so the transfer always equals the computed value exactly. No external call (the `safeTransfer` at line 444 or the optional callback at line 449) can overwrite a caller's local stack variable in the EVM.
